extra_login_bonus_list.title_str: The Football Festival Campaign Second Half

agent_list.title: Germany 2014
agent_list.description:
Big Time features exclusive card designs inspired by the player's memorable performance in the selected match. Big Time players may be able to perform a "Monumental Celebration", which is the exact goal celebration that they performed in the highlighted match. Also, the commentators may make special remarks for certain Big Time players, which helps create an immersive experience. *Player Type is Epic.
Epic players reflect a standout performance they put out during a specific season during their career. They also feature unique card designs stylized after photos taken during the season they are based on.
Highlight players have different stats compared to their Standard counterparts, and they can also be further developed.
Sign these soccer greats and make your team that much stronger!
agent_list.note_text: *The displayed Overall Ratings reflect the highest possible Ratings of the players.

agent_list.title: Japan 2026
agent_list.description:
In addition to the 6 "Show Time" players and 6 Highlight players listed below, 138 other currently active players will make an appearance on the Special Player List.
Highlight players have different stats compared to their Standard counterparts, and they can also be further developed.
Presented in a special card design, "Show Time" focuses on players' exceptional performances in the current season. Show Time players have higher stats than their Highlight counterparts, and some may even possess special Player Skills that reflect their significant impact in the current season. *Player Type is Highlight.
Sign a talented player to further boost your team!
agent_list.note_text: *The displayed Overall Ratings reflect the highest possible Ratings of the players.

agent_list.title: National Stars 2014
agent_list.description:
In addition to the 3 Epic players and 8 Highlight players listed below, 139 other currently active players will make an appearance on the Special Player List.
Epic players reflect a standout performance they put out during a specific season during their career. They also feature unique card designs stylized after photos taken during the season they are based on.
Highlight players have different stats compared to their Standard counterparts, and they can also be further developed.
Sign these soccer greats and make your team that much stronger!
agent_list.note_text: *The displayed Overall Ratings reflect the highest possible Ratings of the players.

agent_list.title: International Cup Day 21
agent_list.description:
We will select the players who make their mark in fiery national team matches played each day and, as early as the next day at ua0000043200, feature them in eFootball™ in a way that reflects their performance in the latest match.
To sign a POTD, earn Event Rewards in the VS AI Event "International Cup Day", or spend some eFootball™ Coins after the Event ends.
Sign one of the stars of the moment and strengthen your team!

*At a later point, a player introduced as a POTD may appear again or be featured as a Show Time player.
*The Event will be held each day, with a different Special Player List for each reward.
*In some cases, a POTD will not appear due to the country, region, or player.
agent_list.note_text: *The displayed Overall Ratings reflect the highest possible Ratings of the players.
